user_feedback: can you make it so that the damage, shield, heal, and effects (like the + healht or minus health) are mapped ontop of the correct player, like right now the health effect (like the green text) for the hero is ontop of the enemy player, fix that
analysis:
- Issue identified: Floating text effects (damage, healing, shield) are appearing at incorrect coordinates, often on the wrong entity (e.g., healing text appearing over the enemy instead of the player).
- Files affected: `entities.js`, `match3.js`
- Changes needed:
    - In `entities.js`: Update `createFloatingText` coordinates in `castUltimate` (target enemy) and `attack` (target player) to match the visual positions of those entities defined in `ui.js`.
    - In `match3.js`: Update `createFloatingText` coordinates in `processMatches` for damage (target enemy) and healing (target player). Add a floating text effect for shield gain (target player) as requested.
    - Player text coordinate: ~ (60, 250) (Above player avatar).
    - Enemy text coordinate: ~ (140, 100) (Above enemy sprite).
